# Stack Profile
<!-- Auto-generated by /critic-review. Edit to customize. -->

## Tech Stack
Claude Code skills (Markdown), scoring rubrics, reference examples. No application code — this is a prompt engineering / AI configuration project.

## Analysis Scope
- Rubric design: scoring categories, point allocation, tier thresholds
- Reference example quality: calibration effectiveness, anonymization completeness
- Internal consistency: rubric ↔ example ↔ SKILL.md template alignment
- Agentic prompt engineering: will auditor agents reliably follow the rubric?

## Best Practices
- Rubric items must be independently scorable (no overlapping criteria)
- Elite example must score consistently against the rubric it references
- Point allocations should reflect empirical value (ETH Zurich research basis)
- Tier thresholds should scale proportionally when total changes
- Anonymization must preserve structural patterns while removing identifying details

## Analysis Format
- `skills/audit-claude-md/references/scoring-rubric.md` — scoring criteria
- `skills/audit-claude-md/references/elite-example.md` — calibration reference
- `skills/audit-claude-md/SKILL.md` — audit workflow and report template
